rationale: Active war remains the dominant reality for Ukrainian residents; Ukraine's own strikes on Russian energy infrastructure are a continuation of established strategy; Iran deal uncertainty keeps US attention divided.

top_events.title: Ukraine continues targeting Russian energy infrastructure (sea terminal hit)
top_events.summary: Ukraine's strikes on Russian energy assets continue as part of the ongoing war strategy. This is a continuation of established pattern — no qualitative escalation or de-escalation for Ukrainian civilians.

top_events.title: US-Iran deal uncertainty keeps US attention divided
top_events.summary: Trump's focus on Iran deal negotiations continues to divert US diplomatic bandwidth away from Ukraine, sustaining concern about the pace and scale of Western support.

top_events.title: Israel attacks Lebanon amid regional tensions
top_events.summary: Israeli strikes on Lebanon further complicate the Middle East picture and keep US focus split, with indirect implications for Ukraine's position in Western priority rankings.
